title: Frequently asked questions
subtitle: Quick answers about global hiring and our services

items.question: What is an Employer of Record (EOR)?
items.answer: An Employer of Record is a company that legally employs workers on your behalf in countries where you don't have a local entity. We handle payroll, taxes, compliance, and employment contracts so you can hire talent anywhere without setting up a subsidiary.

items.question: How quickly can I hire in a new country?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank, you can typically onboard employees in most countries within 48–72 hours. We manage local contracts, compliance, and payroll so you can focus on growing your team.

items.question: Which countries do you support?
items.answer: We support 160+ countries across Europe, Asia-Pacific, the Americas, and more. Our network includes local entities and experts to ensure compliant employment and payroll in each market.

items.question: Do you handle payroll and compliance?
items.answer: Yes. We handle payroll processing, tax withholdings, social security, benefits administration, and local compliance in every country we operate in, so you stay fully compliant without a local entity.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Contact us with your hiring needs, countries, roles, and headcount. We'll provide a tailored proposal and guide you through onboarding. Most clients are live within a few days.

items.question: What is the cost of using an EOR?
items.answer: Costs vary by country and headcount. We offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Using an EOR typically saves €110K–200K per country compared to setting up your own entity. Request a quote for your specific needs.

items.question: Do you support contractor and freelance arrangements?
items.answer: Yes. We offer contractor management alongside EOR, so you can hire both employees and contractors in 160+ countries with compliant contracts, payments, and tax documentation.

items.question: What support do you provide after onboarding?
items.answer: We provide 24/7 dedicated support, local HR experts, payroll and compliance management, and ongoing guidance. You get a single point of contact for all employment and payroll matters in each country.
